meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills Setup: Escape Tutorial Hell for Founders
content.seo_description: Stop watching tutorials and start shipping. Learn how to leverage Claude Code and Antigravity to build high-revenue SaaS products at lightning speed.
content.answer_block: Escape tutorial hell by shifting from passive consumption to active production. Use Claude Code to automate boilerplate and Antigravity to architect your MVP logic. By integrating these tools, you transform your IDE into a high-velocity engine, ensuring your development cycle prioritizes business logic over syntax errors and configuration fatigue.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is paved with 'perfect' tutorials that never saw a production server. You’ve spent weeks configuring environments and watching code-along videos, but your revenue remains at zero. The friction between your vision and your implementation is not a lack of knowledge; it is a lack of velocity.

Today, we pivot. We are moving beyond the tutorial trap by weaponizing Claude Code and Antigravity. This isn't just about writing code; it’s about architecting a system that turns your business requirements into deployable features in minutes, not days. It’s time to stop learning how to build and start actually building.

steps.title: Environment Hardening
steps.description: Establish a clean, robust baseline for your project to prevent environment-specific bugs that stall development.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and suggest an optimal folder hierarchy for a scalable SaaS MVP, ensuring strict separation of concerns.

steps.title: Automated Architectural Blueprinting
steps.description: Use Antigravity to define your data schema and business logic before writing a single line of code.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive ERD and API specification for a subscription-based SaaS product with Stripe integration and user authentication.

steps.title: Rapid Iteration Loop
steps.description: Deploy Claude Code to write your core service layer based on the blueprints generated in the previous step.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Transform this API specification into functional, production-ready TypeScript handlers for the user authentication module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write 'implement auth handlers based on ./db/schema.prisma'

steps.title: Context-Aware Debugging
steps.description: Eliminate the 'trial and error' cycle by feeding error logs directly into Claude Code for surgical fixes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these stack traces and identify the root cause of the middleware failure, then provide a patch that improves performance.

steps.title: Production-Ready Refactoring
steps.description: Optimize your codebase for performance and maintainability before your first user sign-up.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the current codebase for security vulnerabilities, performance bottlenecks, and redundant logic. Refactor for maximum efficiency.

pro_tips: Never commit code generated by AI without a manual 'logic check'—treat the AI as a junior dev, not a senior architect.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to keep the business objective context persistent across multiple sessions.
Prioritize building the 'Happy Path' first; edge cases are revenue-draining distractions in the MVP phase.
Leverage Antigravity to document your code in real-time so your technical debt remains transparent as you scale.
Always run your Claude Code commands in a dedicated git branch to ensure you can revert high-velocity architectural changes instantly.
content.next_steps: Deploy your MVP to a staging environment and run a smoke test using your newly automated pipeline. Once verified, initiate your first user feedback loop.
content.conversion_block: Stop building for the sake of learning and start building for the sake of revenue. You have the tools, the architecture, and the strategy to dominate your niche. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
